subject: Fwd: Great coverage on my hotel
body:
Dear Jeffery 

>> Just wanted to share with you some great coverage for my hotel in this week’s Time Out Dubai:
>> 
>> 
>> 1.       101 Reasons to Love Summer in Dubai – Anantara Spa’s Teaser treatments
>> 
>> 
>> 
>> 2.       101 Reasons to Love Summer in Dubai – keeping cool in the lagoons with our beach pass
>> 
>> 
>> 
>> 3.       Iftar in Crescendo – situated in this week’s ‘To-do list’, this is a fantastic piece of coverage for the outlet in one of Time Out’s most prominent regular features.
>> 
>> 
>>
body_html:
Dear Jeffery

Just wanted to share with you some great coverage for my hotel in this week’s Time Out Dubai:

  1.   101 Reasons to Love Summer in Dubai – Anantara Spa’s Teaser treatments

  2.   101 Reasons to Love Summer in Dubai – keeping cool in the lagoons with our beach pass

  3.   Iftar in Crescendo – situated in this week’s ‘To-do list’, this is a fantastic piece of coverage for the outlet in one of Time Out’s most prominent regular features.
